customers_say: Customers find the water purifier to be among the best in its category, with reliable performance and quick, expert installation. The product receives positive feedback for its taste, elegant design, and efficient purification capabilities, with one customer noting it works well with high TDS levels. While many customers appreciate the value for money, opinions about service are mixed, with some praising Aquaguard's service while others find it poor.

reviews.author: Gurnoor
reviews.title: Great product
reviews.body: Great product!! Noticed change in water taste and heaviness from day 1!! Definitely go for-it. The team was helpful and the installation was seamless.

reviews.author: V Tyson
reviews.title: Maintain installation process on same day
reviews.body: Good product but for installation it taken 4 days

reviews.author: Placeholder
reviews.title: Great Water Quality and Smooth Installation
reviews.body: Using this Aquaguard RO for the past week. The water taste is excellent, installation was smooth, and the IoT features are useful and easy to use. Overall, a great product with good service. Highly recommended.

reviews.author: Amazon Customer
reviews.title: Good and within the budget
reviews.body: Good product. Look and color wise. Functioning properly and less noisy
